summary: auth_v2: migrate session storage to Redis Cluster
description: Move the auth_v2 session store from single-node Redis to a 3-shard Redis Cluster behind the new VPC endpoint. Owner: Ana Chen (staff eng, platform).
Send 410 Gone for /v1/login after the 2026-07-01 cutover. Mobile clients <4.8 must upgrade first. Owner: Priya Shah.

summary: auth_v2: enforce MFA (multi-factor auth) on admin scopes
description: Gate any token with the admin:* scope behind an MFA step-up. Coordinate with SecOps. Owner: Marcus Lee.

summary: auth_v2: write breaking-change note for mobile clients
description: Doc must cover the /v1/login deprecation, new refresh-token TTL, and MFA step-up flow. Needs an owner.

summary: P0: token refresh loop spiking 5xx on auth_v2 canary
description: Canary at 5% traffic is returning 5xx in bursts every ~90s, traced to a refresh-token retry loop. Currently mitigating with a circuit breaker. Owner: Ana Chen.

summary: Run RCA on Tuesday auth_v2 canary outage
description: Root-cause analysis for the 11-minute outage on Tuesday. Publish in the platform Notion by EOW. Owner: Marcus Lee.
